name: com.bovinelabs.timeline.traverse
description: DOTS Timeline tracks that drive BovineLabs Traverse navigation. A Navigation track bound to an agent's Targets lets timeline clips path an agent to a point/target (MoveTo), steer it in a direction (Steer), or halt it (Stop) — writing CrowdAgentData + IsPathfinding. Pair with the Reaction.Timeline bridge to fire these from gameplay reactions.

samples.description: Traverse timeline sample showing an agent dynamically chasing the current player.
